title: For Patients | FDA
text:
me more informed and involved in FDA regulatory decisions related to medical products.
Approval and Recalls 
FDA Drug Approvals 
Get information about FDA-approved brand name and generic prescription and over-the-counter human drugs and biological therapeutic products.
FDA Device Approvals 
Find information about what the device is, how it works, when it can be used, and when it should not be used.
FDA Recalls, Market Withdrawls, & Safety Alerts 
Review information gathered from press releases and other public notices about recalls, withdrawls, and safety alerts of FDA-regulated products.
Expanded Access and Clinical Trials 
Expanded Access: Information for Patients 
Learn about expanded access, including information about the expanded access process, what FDA considers, and what costs may be involved.
Learn about Expanded Access and other Treatment Options 
Learn about treatment options for when a patient does not respond to current approved treatments.
Patient Perspectives 
Patients Matter Video Series 
Watch short videos developed to inform patients and other stakeholders about FDA patient initiatives and patient engagement efforts.
When a Patient Speaks: Testimonials from FDA Patient Representatives 
Watch short videos where FDA Patient Representatives share what it means to serve in their unique role.
Patient Listening Sessions 
Patients, caregivers, advocates and communit
